content:
# Arab-C Reservoir

**Summary**: A major carbonate reservoir in the Arab formation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011]] studied the arab-c-reservoir to determine its stratigraphic framework.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011]] shallow marine carbonate shelf

## Reservoir Properties

- [[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011]] 120-160 ft thick; water depth 0-15m

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The reservoir is an overall fining-upward composite sequence subdivided into six high-frequency sequences. ([[2011-busubait|Busubait, 2011, p. 12]])
